use_codes.desc: MANAGEMENT OF ACUTE PAIN SEVERE ENOUGH TO REQUIRE AN OPIOID ANALGESIC AND FOR WHICH ALTERNATIVE TREATMENTS ARE INADEQUATE

indications.text:
APADAZ is indicated for the short-term (no more than 14 days) management of acute pain severe
enough to require an opioid analgesic and for which alternative treatments are inadequate.
Limitations of Use
Because of the risks of addiction, abuse, and misuse with opioids, even at recommended doses
